title: Trump says not to rush as U.S. nears potential Iran deal
snippet: Trump stated 'not to rush' and that 'time is on our side' regarding the Iran deal, signaling that the naval blockade will remain in place as leverage while negotiations continue.
tag_reason: 신규 — 트럼프가 이란 합의를 서두르지 않겠다고 발언하며 봉쇄를 협상 지렛대로 유지하겠다는 입장을 밝힌 보도
